title: Given
tmdbOverview: Haruki secretly had feelings for Akihiko for years, but Akihiko was still in a relationship with his roommate, the violinist Ugetsu Murata. Haruki, Akihiko, and Ugetsu's love clashes and starts to move forward.
synopsis: Given (2020) is a animation, drama and music film from Japan. It holds a solid 7.7 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a PG certification (AU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
